global.description: The ad features a vibrant design with a focus on the NovaPay brand and its offerings.
global.main_message: Promoting the NovaPay app with a focus on security and simplicity.

elements.label: Secure & simple

elements.label: No hidden fees
elements.description: A smaller text element that emphasizes transparency with the phrase 'No hidden fees'.
